top_signals.title: Keynote speech by Commissioner Kubilius at the event of the 25th anniversary of the EU Military Committee
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 21 May 2026 Good afternoon.
The ancient Greeks had a saying about war: War is the father of all things, even of instruments for peace.
The EUMC was forged in the dark shado...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘It will reduce jobs’ – Jamie Dimon sounds off on AI’s impact on banks
top_signals.summary: One of the world’s leading financial figures has warned AI will inevitably lead to a cut in jobs amid growing jitters around the impact the new tech will have on the banking sector. Jamie Dimon – the top boss of America’s largest bank, JP Morgan – said: “I think [AI] will reduce our jobs down [...]

top_signals.title: Hormuz Disruption Drives Panama Canal Transits
top_signals.summary: "So far this year, ship transits via the Panama Canal have increased 8% y/y to a daily average of 38, driven by the tanker sector. Transits have been especially high during the past five weeks, rising 16% y/y, as US energy exports to the Pacific jumped…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
